objective: Resource CleanMac localization through .lproj/Localizable.strings and commit the verified result.
exit_condition: The goal is complete when CleanMacCore localizations live in en.lproj and zh-Hans.lproj Localizable.strings, L10n loads copy via Bundle.module instead of hardcoded language tables, localization tests prove resource coverage, plutil validates both strings files, swift test passes, and the resulting changes are committed.

phases.name: Move strings into .lproj resources and load them through Bundle.module
Verify strings syntax and full SwiftPM test suite

current.focus: Goal complete: localization resources are implemented, verified, and ready to be committed in this checkpoint.
current.next_action: Stop scheduling after the commit succeeds.

decisions.decision: Use SwiftPM package resources with en.lproj and zh-Hans.lproj instead of adding L10nKit.
decisions.reason: CleanMac is a package-first macOS app with an existing lightweight L10n API; resource-backed lookup satisfies the requested .lproj migration without adding an unnecessary remote dependency.

decisions.decision: Keep AppLanguage storage values unchanged while mapping ResolvedLanguage to lproj folder names.
decisions.reason: Existing user defaults and tests expect english/chinese values, while Bundle resources need en and zh-Hans names.

decisions.decision: Try both zh-Hans and lowercase zh-hans when locating resource bundles.
decisions.reason: SwiftPM normalizes the built resource directory to zh-hans.lproj even though the source folder is zh-Hans.lproj.

decisions.decision: Do not stage the pre-existing untracked Assets directory.
decisions.reason: Those files are unrelated to the localization resource migration.
